description_long: This is a highly stylized, triple-neck electric guitar with an aggressive, angular body shape reminiscent of heavy metal aesthetics. The body is adorned with various stickers and graffiti-style artwork, giving it a rebellious, urban character. Each of the three necks features a different color scheme—one in green, one in orange, and one in red—adding to its visual complexity and uniqueness. The headstocks are pointed and match the color themes of their respective necks, while the fretboards are marked with bold inlays. The guitar is equipped with multiple control knobs and switches, likely for tone and pickup selection, and metallic hardware is visible throughout. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood with metal components and plastic details, making it both robust and visually striking.
description: A triple-neck electric guitar with a spiked, angular body, covered in stickers and graffiti, featuring green, orange, and red necks and metallic hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the guitar, all three necks, colorful fretboards, and the sticker-covered body.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backs of the necks and the dark, less-decorated rear body.
description_view_2: Side profile emphasizing the thickness of the body and the alignment of the three necks.
description_view_3: Oblique view showing the layered arrangement of the necks and the edge of the decorated body.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed, color-matched headstocks with inline tuning pegs and no visible logos
